contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Telegram adapter for autopilot — private single-user chat, deployed + locked
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/44
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/209
  
  Details:
  Shipped and deployed roadmap Track B (B1-B3): a private Telegram bot in front of the autopilot chat so Gary can drive it from his phone.
  
  - truesight_autopilot#44: standalone long-poll adapter (separate systemd unit — the web app runs 2 workers and would race on getUpdates). Single-user allowlist gate; resolves Gary's governor public key from the DAO registry and mints a short-lived JWT to call /chat-blocking as 'Gary Teh' (identity reuse = B3); X-Session-Id = tg:<chat>:<topic> so each Telegram topic is its own context (B2); bootstrap mode reveals the sender's own ID for first-time pinning. 10 unit tests pass.
  - deploy.sh updated to install/enable/restart both systemd units.
  - Deployed to prod EC2; bot @truesight_autopilot_bot live; locked to Gary's Telegram user ID (allowlist=[2102593402]); both services active; /health ok.
  - Roadmap tracker updated (agentic_ai_context#209) and proposed public-Q&A tier recorded as Track C.
  
  PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/44 , https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/209
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
